title: Super Mario Sunshine Music Pack
description: Adds music tracks curated from Sunshine and the romhack Eclipse that play across the game.
body:
Here's a resource pack designed to bring that tropical vibe over to the not as tropical world of Minecraft. It adds a total of 46 music tracks from Super Mario Sunshine and the popular romhack Super Mario Eclipse into the game. Supports the mods of Aether, Twilight Forest, and Biomes O' Plenty. Has music toasts in English US.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/If4_gOyee6k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Delfino Airstrip
- Bianco Hills
- Bowser
- Casino Delfino
- Corona Mountain
- Staff Credits
- Demo
- Event
- FLUDD Tutorial
- Gelato Beach
- Hotel Delfino
- Delfino Plaza
- Noki Bay
- Noki Depths
- Pianta Village
- Pianta Vullage Fluff Festival
- Pinna Beach
- Pinna Park
- Ricco Harbor

- Shadow Mario

- Sky and Sea

Eclipse (26):

- Daisy Cruiser
- Cruiser Cabin

- Pianta Pit

- Ricco Station
- Secret Aquarium
- Spettro Casino

- Starglow Road
- Starshine Beach
- Vaporwave
- Warship Island
- Yoshi Village
- Yoshi Village (Fiery Fight with Fire Petey!)

Please support the original Super Mario Eclipse mod, this pack was only made for fun.
